title: External Links in New Tab
excerpt: I believe all external links should open in a new tab. It seems odd to constantly be leaving monday when you click links.

posts.author: LandFunding (Logan Swanson)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe all external links should open in a new tab. It seems odd to constantly be leaving monday when you click links.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Logan! Thanks for your feedback! Have you tried checking your browser preferences to see if you can create a setting to always open a new tab with a link?

If that’s not possible, maybe try using the “Command” + click shortcut a try when you click on a link!

Either way, we appreciate hearing your feedback on what would improve your user experience on our platform!
